name: open-webui
description: Open WebUI is an extensible, self-hosted AI interface that operates offline. It supports various LLM providers like Ollama, OpenAI, and Anthropic. Features include conversation memory, RAG, model management, and a ChatGPT-like interface for local AI interactions.

paths.name: App Data
paths.description: Application database, user data, and configuration storage.

ports.name: Web UI Port
ports.description: Web interface port for accessing OpenWebUI dashboard.

variables.name: OLLAMA_BASE_URL
variables.description: Ollama server URL for local model access. Use 'http://ollama:11434' for Docker setup or 'http://host.docker.internal:11434' for host setup.

variables.name: WEBUI_JWT_SECRET_KEY
variables.description: JWT secret key for session management. Generate with: openssl rand -hex 32

variables.name: ENABLE_SIGNUP
variables.description: Allow new user registration. Set to 'false' for private instances.

variables.name: ENABLE_MEMORIES
variables.description: Enable AI memory system for persistent conversation context.

variables.name: DEFAULT_MODELS
variables.description: Default model to use when no specific model is selected.

variables.name: WEBUI_NAME
variables.description: Name displayed in the web interface.

variables.name: WEBUI_URL
variables.description: Base URL for the web interface. Update for reverse proxy setups.
